title: cyperus subcaracasanus
intro: Cyperus subcaracasanus, also known as the Lesser Papyrus or Dwarf Papyrus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cyperus subcaracasanus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, typically made by steeping the roots or rhizomes in hot water, to harness its medicinal properties.
